title: Applying for a personal loan? Here's the list of documents you will need
summary: To get a personal loan, a borrower must submit certain documents. Applicants should prepare documentation in advance for quicker processing. Here's a list of documents you will need and eligibility criteria to apply for a personal loan.

title: REITs distribute ₹8900 crore to unitholders in FY26, a 50% increase in disbursements
summary: In FY26, India's five publicly listed REITs distributed over ₹8900 crore to unitholders, marking a 50% increase from the previous year. They manage over 187 million square feet of real estate, reflecting their growing importance in capital markets.

title: UPI goes live in Cambodia: Indian tourists can now pay at 4.5 million merchant outlets via KHQR
summary: Indian users will be able to make QR payments at over 4.5 million merchant outlets in Cambodia. The next phase of the initiative will allow Cambodian visitors to do the same in India. Details here.

title: 8th Pay Commission: 10 key FAQs on salary hike, pension and fitment factor for central government employees
summary: The 8th Pay Commission, constituted on November 3, 2025, is reviewing salaries and pensions for central government employees and pensioners over its 18-month tenure. Its recommendations, expected by May 2027, will significantly impact financial benefits and livelihoods amidst rising inflation.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has an estimated net worth of ₹7 crore at 15: How does income tax work for minors?
summary: Teen cricketer Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has a net worth of ₹7 crore at 15, primarily from cricket earnings and endorsements. Tax laws for minors in India generally club their income with that of the parent, with exceptions for specific circumstances like income from personal skills. Details here.

title: ₹50,000 salary blueprint for Bengaluru women: Budgeting, SIPs, tax planning and wealth creation
summary: Working women in Bengaluru earning ₹50,000 should prioritize personalized financial planning. By tracking expenses, building an emergency fund, and utilizing AI tools for budgeting, they can achieve financial stability and make informed decisions for their future.

title: Equity MFs investing in energy stocks turn chart toppers
summary: Despite economic strain from the oil shock, equity mutual funds in the energy sector have performed remarkably, gaining 9.4% in 2026. The Nifty Energy Index rose 14.3%, benefiting from strong earnings growth and high demand, making these funds a tactical investment choice for high-risk investors.

title: ITR filing AY 2026-27: Why salaried taxpayers should wait until 15 June before filing returns
summary: The Income Tax Act, 2025, effective from April 1, 2026, renames Form 16 to Form 130. Salaried taxpayers should wait until June 15 to file ITR for AY 2026-27, as employers must provide Form 130 by this date for accurate filing.

title: Why AA matters more than stock selection for multi-generational wealth
summary: For multi-generational wealth, effective asset allocation is crucial. Relying solely on stock selection increases risk and volatility. A balanced portfolio enhances stability and growth potential, safeguarding investments against economic downturns and ensuring long-term wealth preservation.

title: US stocks today: US stocks end modestly higher as AI zeal overcomes Middle East jitters
summary: US stocks ended mixed as AI-driven optimism supported markets but was offset by rising geopolitical tensions and oil prices. Small-cap and semiconductor stocks gained, while software lagged. title: Alkem Labs sees Rs 930 crore block deal as promoter family entities pare stake; Goldman, Morgan Stanley among key buyers
summary: Alkem Laboratories shares experienced significant block deals totaling Rs 930 crore. Promoter family entities divested shares to a group of domestic mutual funds and foreign institutional investors. This transaction occurred after a strong performance by Alkem Laboratories shares over the past year.

title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Wednesday
summary: Indian benchmark indices ended higher after a volatile session, with late buying in heavyweight IT stocks lifting sentiment. Sensex gained 382 points and Nifty closed above 23,480, while investors tracked monsoon progress, inflation trends, RBI policy outlook and liquidity conditions.

title: HFCL, Acme Solar Holdings among 6 stocks that hit 52-week high; rally up to 64% in a month
summary: HFCL, Acme Solar Holdings and four other BSE 500 stocks hit fresh 52-week highs on Tuesday, with HFCL leading the rally after surging 64% in the past month amid strong buying momentum.
